name: Cawachi Limited
summary: Cawachi Limited manages drugstores in Japan. The company retails pharmaceuticals, health foods, child care products, cosmetics, daily miscellaneous goods, general food products, confectionery products, etc. It also involved in the insurance business. The company operates 346 drugstores. Cawachi Limited was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Oyama, Japan.
